name: Aica Kogyo Company, Limited
summary: Aica Kogyo Company, Limited manufactures and sells chemicals, architectural, housing materials, and specialty and performance materials. The company offers chemical products, including exterior and interior finishing materials, floor coating materials, adhesives, and construction and civil works repair and reinforcement materials; and building panels, such as melamine and noncombustible decorative panels, and decorative boards and films. It also provides building materials comprising interior doors and building materials, storage products, and countertops; and functional materials, such as solar battery and automotive part adhesives and sealants, silicone materials, organic particles, and electronic materials. In addition, the company offers toilet booths; residential and nursing home housing products; and water based resins. The company was formerly known as Aichi Kagaku Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Aica Kogyo Company, Limited in June 1966. Aica Kogyo Company, Limited was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
